description_long: This is a striking double-neck electric guitar with a bold blue and white color scheme, featuring two sets of necks and headstocks extending from a single contoured body. The body is solid and finished in a glossy blue with a white pickguard, and it is adorned with metallic hardware including control knobs, pickups, and bridges. The lower neck appears to have six strings, while the upper neck has twelve, making it suitable for versatile musical performances. The headstocks are both blue and equipped with chrome tuning pegs, and the fretboards are dark with white inlays. The back of the guitar is uniformly blue with a black electronics cavity cover. A 'citi' logo is visible on the front, suggesting a custom or branded design, and the overall construction is robust, likely made from wood and metal components.
description: A blue and white double-neck electric guitar with chrome hardware, two headstocks, and a 'citi' logo on the body. It features both six-string and twelve-string necks for versatile play.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue and white body, chrome hardware, two necks, and the 'citi' logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the alignment of the two necks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue back and the black electronics cavity cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the body and necks.
attribute_headstock_design: Blue, rectangular headstocks with three tuners per side on the lower neck and six per side on the upper neck, no visible logo on headstocks.
